## Instructions

Before working with docker-compose projects, read these files:

- `HAL.md` — hal docker-compose conventions (in this directory)
- `PROJECT.md` — repo-specific docker-compose notes (in this directory, if it exists)
- `~/.config/hal/docker-compose/USER.md` — personal settings (port ranges, domain, infrastructure)
